description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBlue textured bag with inverted box pleat detail in frontOne main compartmentInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket at backTwo short handles for carrying easeMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 31 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 19 cm
